Appearances: Avid Alavi appeared by zoom for Barbara De Vries.

Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Barbara De Vries.

Mr. Schultz stated that there is no objection or communication from any Beneficiary. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $1,000,000.00.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
